[What is currently happening]

### Expected Behavior

[What should happen instead]

[If you have identified the root cause, describe it here. Otherwise, delete this section.]

### Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Bug is fixed and verified
- [ ] Regression test added to prevent this bug in the future
- [ ] Related areas validated
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

### Environment

- **.NET Version**: [e.g., 8.0]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11]
- **Browser** (if applicable): [e.g., Chrome 124]

### Affected Components

- [Component 1]
- [Component 2]

### Severity

**[ ] Critical** — System broken, data loss, security issue  
**[ ] High** — Major feature broken  
**[ ] Medium** — Feature partially broken or degraded  
**[ ] Low** — Minor issue, cosmetic

### Estimated Story Points

**[Number] points** — [Justification]
